description_long: This is a thick, hardbound book with a black leather-like cover, featuring a gold-embossed geometric frame and an open book symbol at its center. The cover has a subtle, textured pattern that gives it a luxurious and slightly worn appearance. The spine is also black with matching gold geometric and book motifs, providing a cohesive and ornate design. The pages are visibly aged, with a brownish tint and a rough, fibrous texture, suggesting the book is old or designed to look antique. The back cover is plain black, lacking any decoration or text. The overall appearance is that of a special or mystical tome, possibly used for ceremonial or scholarly purposes.
description: A thick, black leather-bound book with gold geometric and book motifs on the cover and spine, and aged, brownish pages.
description_view_0: The front cover displays a gold-embossed geometric frame with an open book symbol at the center on a textured black background.
description_view_1: The top edge reveals the book's thick, brownish, aged pages, showing their fibrous texture.
description_view_2: The back cover is plain black with a subtle leather texture and no visible decoration.
description_view_3: The spine features gold geometric and book motifs matching the front, set against the same black leather-like material.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a gold-embossed geometric frame with an open book symbol at its center, rendered in a clean, symmetrical style. The design is ornate and decorative, giving the book a mystical or ceremonial appearance.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is black with gold geometric and book motifs matching the front cover, arranged in a vertical orientation. There is no visible text, only decorative elements.
